t.t-value: ', '.join(filter(None, [fp_receiver_partner.street, fp_receiver_partner.fp_district_id.name if fp_receiver_partner.fp_district_id else False, fp_receiver_partner.fp_canton_id.name if fp_receiver_partner.fp_canton_id else False, fp_receiver_partner.fp_province_id.name if fp_receiver_partner.fp_province_id else False]))
o.reversed_entry_id.fp_consecutive_number if o.fp_document_type == 'NC' and o.reversed_entry_id else (o.ref or '-')
o.invoice_currency_rate if o._fields.get('invoice_currency_rate') and o.invoice_currency_rate else 1.0
o.fp_sale_condition if o._fields.get('fp_sale_condition') and o.fp_sale_condition else (o.invoice_payment_term_id.name or '-')
o.fp_payment_method if o._fields.get('fp_payment_method') and o.fp_payment_method else '-'

fp_ship and (fp_ship.port_origin_id or fp_ship.port_destination_id or fp_ship.etd or fp_ship.eta or fp_ship.vessel_name or fp_ship.shipping_company or fp_ship.carrier_partner_id or fp_ship.container_ids or fp_ship.booking_id or fp_ship.gps_device_id)

span.t-esc: fp_document_types.get(o.fp_document_type, o.fp_document_type) if o._fields.get('fp_document_type') else o.move_type
'%.3f' % sum(l.fp_net_weight or 0.0 for l in fp_product_lines)
'%.3f' % sum(l.fp_gross_weight or 0.0 for l in fp_product_lines)
'{:.2f}'.format(sum(t.amount for t in o.line_ids.filtered(lambda l: l.tax_line_id)))

div.div: Emitida conforme la resolución de Facturación Electrónica de Costa Rica. Versión del documento 4.4.

span.t-esc: '%.3f' % sum(l.fp_net_weight or 0.0 for l in fp_product_lines)
'%.3f' % sum(l.fp_gross_weight or 0.0 for l in fp_product_lines)

div.div: Terms of Sale · Términos de Venta

Inspection & Claims. Buyer shall inspect within 24h of unloading. Quality claims must be notified in writing within 48h, supported by independent surveyor report (SGS, Bureau Veritas, Control Union), photographs with metadata, datalogger reading and box identification. Unsupported claims shall not be processed.

Payment Terms & Late Interest. Late payments accrue interest at 1.5%/month from due date. Buyer shall not deduct or offset without prior written agreement. Payment of undisputed amounts may not be withheld due to claims on separate shipments.

Risk Transfer & Cold Chain. Risk passes to Buyer per the INCOTERM stated. Cold chain maintenance and product custody after risk transfer is Buyer's exclusive responsibility. Maximum claim value shall not exceed FOB value of affected boxes.

Title, Governing Law & Disputes. Title remains with Seller until full payment in cleared funds. Governed by the laws of Costa Rica supplemented by CISG (1980). Disputes resolved by arbitration at CICA (San José) in English. Acceptance of goods or payment constitutes acceptance of these terms.
Ministerio de Hacienda — Costa Rica · FE v4.4
